endpoints.name: GET /v1/Faxes
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all faxes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Faxes/{FaxSid}/Media
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all fax media instances for the specified fax.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FAXSID}} with a real faxsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Faxes/{FaxSid}/Media/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific fax media instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FAXSID}} with a real faxsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Faxes/{FaxSid}/Media/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific fax media instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FAXSID}} with a real faxsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Faxes/{Sid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Faxes/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific fax and its associated media.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
